name: Rupee
description:
Rupee has invited you to the Coin Rush Casino to take part in her private slot machine and poker games, all using her very own "special gold coins". She provides a wonderful array of services, and all it takes is a certain amount of her coins. But don't take too long to gather coins, otherwise your competition may beat you to the grand prize!

Rupee/Rabbit Deluxe/Bunnysuit/Bunny suit

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Creator Notes

Here's a bot to tide you over until I get more time to work on them again. I'm back for short reemergence before I disappear again, although this time I'll be back within a month with more bots. This is basically straight smut, but with a bit of an interesting twist since you'll be directly competing with her other patrons for her attention and services. Please leave a review to let me know what you thought of the bot!

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Credits for images used

Portrait is official art from the game Goddess of Victory: Nikke

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Troubleshooting

If you are having any issues with the bot please take a look at my tips & tricks/troubleshooting section on my profile page. If you are still having issues after going through it please let me know! I need to know how to recreate any issues so I can fix them.
creator: A.E.I.O.U.
